title: Llewebum (species)
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''Llewebum''' were a sentient species with large bumps across their bodies, including a secondary series of bumps below their arms. The [[Senator/Legends|senator]] from [[Llewebum]] was severely injured in the explosion caused by [[Kueller]] in the [[Senate Hall]] on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]].

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Rebellion]]'' {{1st}}
